prestazioni: Hybrid powertrain optimization targeting the **PRV 2.6L V6 twin-turbo (engine code: EP6FDTX)** with a bespoke **Bosch MS 2.9 motorsport ECU** reflash, increasing boost pressure from 2.2 bar to 2.8 bar via **Garrett GT35R 84mm turbos** with titanium-aluminide turbine wheels for reduced lag and 900+ hp output, while integrating a **Williams Advanced Engineering MGU-K** recalibration to deliver 200 kW (268 hp) in short bursts (up from 150 kW stock) with a **McLaren Applied TAG-400X** energy management system for 30% faster torque fill during hybrid deployment phases

Chassis-specific **Multimatic DSSV (Dynamic Suspensions Spool Valve) dampers** recalibrated with **Peugeot Sport’s Le Mans-spec bump/rebound curves**, featuring **Titanium Nitride (TiN)-coated 40mm piston rods** for reduced friction and a **Moog 6DOF active anti-roll system** with carbon-fiber sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) to eliminate body roll during 3.5G cornering, paired with **Brembo GT4 6-piston monobloc calipers** (380mm front, 355mm rear) and **Carbon Industries CCM-R discs** with directional cooling vanes for 1,200°C heat resistance

Aerodynamic overhaul with **Peugeot Sport’s WEC-approved ‘Delta Wing’ underbody diffuser** (3D-printed from **Hexcel HexTow IM7 carbon fiber**), generating 1,800 kg of downforce at 300 km/h via **Vortex Dynamics’ active Gurney flaps** (adjustable ±15° in 0.1s increments) and a **Sabelt 6-point FIA-spec harness** with **Schroth Racing’s HANS-compatible Quick-Release system** to handle 4.5G lateral loads, while the **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 CR) are coated with **Plasma Electrolytic Oxidation (PEO)** for 30% improved thermal conductivity under sustained 8,500 RPM operation
estetica: Full **Peugeot Sport x Pininfarina ‘Le Mans Prototype’ livery** with **3M Scotchlite 8910 reflective film** applied to the **carbon-fiber monocoque** (weighing 78 kg) for dynamic color-shifting under track lighting, featuring **Oracle Red Bull Racing-style ‘shark fin’ stabilizer** (1.2m tall, **Toray T800H/3900-2 prepreg**) with integrated **Garmin VIRB 360° 8K cameras** for real-time telemetry overlay

Custom **AP Racing CP8660-10 carbon-carbon clutch** with **Brembo HTC-64T brake pads** (visible through **PPG’s ‘Liquid Metal’ clear-coat** on the **OZ Racing Superleggera VM 20** wheels, 18x13 front/18x15 rear), paired with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (31/71-18 front, 34/71-18 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli’s ‘Cyber Yellow’ sidewall branding** for contrast against the **Sikaflex-221 adhesive-sealed** carbon-fiber wheel arches

Interior stripped to **FIA 8862-2018 safety standards** with a **Sparco Pro 2000 carbon-kevlar seat** (weighing 8.2 kg) upholstered in **Alcantara ‘Suede Tech’** with **Stitchmaster 3D-embroidered Peugeot Sport logos**, a **Momo Prototipo EVO steering wheel** (380mm diameter, **Magneti Marelli LED shift lights**) featuring **AP Racing’s CCPC-9440 paddle shifters**, and a **Cosworth IQ3+ digital dash** with **Bosch Motorsport’s MS 6.4 data logger** displaying **1,000Hz telemetry** (oil pressure, turbo speed, hybrid deployment)
